features: Package-- Include 6pcs different shape blue paper fans, 5pcs latex balloons printed with “It’s a boy”, 5pcs latex balloons with inner confetti, 2pcs blue ribbon, 1pcs IT’S A BOY banner and blue bunting. The total are 20pcs.
All the products are blue theme for baby boy shower party decoration. This set include all the products you need to decorate a party, it can decorate a whole wall.

Easy to assemble and convenient to use, all the products have hang string, package include 2pcs blue ribbon, you can hang the products anywhere you want. Perfect for family members to design the party together.

All the products made of high quality material, the paper fans and bunting are reusable, the latex balloons are 12 inches, everyone will like it. This decoration set will make your party unforgettable.

description: Feature: -The package include 20pcs decoration kit for baby shower party decoration. You can design the party freely. -All the products are blue theme and made of high quality paper. -This decoration set will surprise your friends and brighten up your party. -The latex balloons can be filled with air or helium, please seal the balloons tightly. -Please rub the confetti balloons on the carpet or hair before you inflate it, so that the confetti can stick on the balloons. -"IT’S A BOY” banner are baby clothes shape, it looks adorable and funny.
